entry.title: Re: Addressing Common Questions and Complaints About the New Platform
entry.content:
Hi @jerryjanda 

Is it me or do the managed tags simply not work? 

If I click the "SAP Community" managed tag, I expect to be taken to a page that provides an overview of content with this tag. it could be blogs, Q&A, both mixed together, whatever, but it would be content with this tag. 

What happens is that I seem to get every single post in existence? I get the exact same content if I click on any of the other tags. 

See screenshots below comparing SAP Community tag with SAP Analytics Cloud tag. it is the same content that is displayed. Most of the content has neither tag. 

What the tags do enable though is that I can do a specific search for the text of the tag, and I will get posts that have that tag (as well as posts where the search term is just used somewhere).

But I would think this isn't the only intended usage of the tags?

entry.title: Re: 30 Days of Sharing and Learning for Enterprise Architects: Starts on April 1st
entry.content:
Enterprise Architecture will also get a lot of importance with the acquisition of LeanIX into the SAP family. The Enterprise Architecture forum  in Feb and we have see a huge demand from the communuty . Infrastructure Architectures will move into the EA space (as RISE will force them to think otherwise) and their deep skill with help us shape the EA journey.

The 30 days of Learning will be amazing and I am looking forward to learning (as I could not attend all the sessions I wanted in PHL).

Publishing the conference lectures will sent a new trend on how we share and grow the community.

entry.title: Client export Ended with errors : error code 0006 ( Scrap Data )
entry.content:
We are working on doing client copy from production to Dev. Following Client Export and import methodology. 

During the Prod export process, we have encountered the following error in the log file:

 Transport control program tp ended with error code 0006
 Error exporting request TUPKT00033 01:12:38
 Program ended with error or warning, return code: F

 

2WETW206 scrap char 0x0000 found in RFRR.SRTFD. See note 718511 for details.
3WETW000 (SAP K04C�������� ################                           ). Entry "300RRSAP K04C�������� ################                           ###" not exported.
2WETW206 scrap char in NUMC field found in T512E.LFDNR. See note 718511 for details.
3WETW000   ). Entry "30007KK01/101RT     " not exported.

 

2WETW206 scrap char in NUMC field found in T884H.CODE.



The below SAP note says it is ok to use this export TR file and import in Dev system: Wanted to check what SAPs recommendation is? 
718511 - R3trans: Export error due to "scrap characters" 

Attaching the log file to the case. 
Also only 1 TR which got generated : TUPKT00033
The below TR is not generated during this export process
TUPKX00033" for transporting client-specific texts, provided texts are available in this client


System is open and the credentials are maintained in the secure area. 

Thanks,
Neeraj

entry.title: Re: SAP SuccessFactors People Central Hub: All You Need to Know
entry.content:
Hello @lukemarson,

We already have our SF platform live, namely EC for a few years, and I am currently updating our different Config WBs (Transactions, EE Data, FO, Pos Mgmt & Time Off), which are divided on different Excel files.

When prior asking our SF partner to send us SAP most recent versions of the WBs, we got the "People_Central_Hub_Configuration_Worbook". After going through it, it seems to be a merge of all other WBs in one single file.

Therefore, I was wondering if instead of mantaining the info on separate files, we could have it all on that People Central Hub Config WB.

Let me know your thoughts on this.

Thank you in advance.

Best regards,

entry.content: Could you please let me know the asset accounting Acquisition 100 transaction type default settings.

Getting Session Expired issue when trying to give temporary pin from SAP Build preview app from mobile to SAP build portal

#SAP Build App #Making Barcode Scanner App

entry.title: Insights from the Pregame Show for the Next Generation SAP Enterprise Architect Forum 2024
entry.content:
We kicked off the Next Generation SAP Enterprise Architect Forum with a "Pregame Show" to get the virtual audience warmed up. I am pleased to share this with you to get into the experience as we get set for our "30 Days of Sharing and Learning for Enterprise Architects".

In this kick-off session for the Next Generation SAP Enterprise Architect Forum 2024, Shaun Syvertsen  and I deliver a Pregame Show that underscores the profound impact of community, continuous learning, and innovation within the realm of enterprise architecture.

Through dialogue, we explore the pivotal role of enterprise architects in navigating the ever-evolving technological landscape, emphasizing the importance of human skills, networking, and global collaboration. This talk not only serves as a primer for the forum's proceedings but also as a call for enterprise architecture professionals to actively participate and leverage their collective expertise for driving transformative change.

 Main Recommendations

  • Embrace Community and Networking: Attendees are encouraged to actively engage with the community of enterprise architects by learning, sharing, and connecting with peers. The value of building relationships through in-person interactions at the forum and receptions is highlighted as essential for professional growth and networking.

 

  • Participate Actively for Professional Development: The importance of coming to the event with questions and a willingness to learn is emphasized. Attendees are advised to show up with intent and lean in to get the most out of the sessions and interactions, suggesting that those who share their experiences and questions will benefit greatly from the shared knowledge within the community.

 

  • Expand Horizons Globally: The speakers suggest looking forward to the forum's expansion to other countries and its potential to reach a wider audience. This indicates a recommendation for the audience to think globally about the enterprise architecture community and the impact of their work.

 

  • Focus on Continuous Learning and Adaptation: Given the fast pace of technological change, the speakers stress the need for continuous learning, especially in areas like AI, enterprise architecture practices, and SAP’s RISE program. We recommend staying updated and adaptable to new technologies and methodologies.

 

  • Develop Soft Skills: A significant emphasis is placed on the importance of developing human skills such as storytelling and emotional intelligence. Attendees are encouraged to attend sessions focused on these areas, recognizing that technical prowess alone is not enough for success.

 

  • Create Value and Drive Change: The audience is prompted to think about how they can apply what they've learned to create more value and drive change within their organizations. This reflects a broader aim of not just acquiring knowledge but also implementing it effectively.

 

  • Embrace the Role of Enterprise Architects as Change Agents: The forum discussions suggest that enterprise architects should see themselves as key players in guiding their organizations through technological transformations, recommending a proactive approach to problem-solving and innovation.

 

  • Utilize the Community for Support and Learning: The idea of the forum acting as a start of a learning cohort, where attendees can continue to engage, share, and learn from each other even after the event, suggests a recommendation to leverage the community for ongoing support and development.

 

  • Prioritize Inclusivity and Open Sharing: Attendees are encouraged to create an inclusive environment where open, transparent sharing is valued. This approach is recommended to foster a learning community where diverse thoughts and experiences are welcomed.

 

  • Engage with Content and Speakers Online: For those unable to attend in person, the recommendation is to engage with the event’s content and speakers online, indicating the importance of accessing available resources and participating remotely to benefit from the forum.

Checkout our YouTube Recording and enjoy our Preshow Recording!

https://youtu.be/toguRV4ibUk

entry.title: Splitting Total Cost Recognized Values from RA at the time of Settlement
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have a custom requirement to achieve the below:

There are 5 different heads or Cost Categories for Project Planning and Actuals

1. Labour

2. Material

3. Subcontracting

4. Other Direct Costs

5. Production Overhead

Here RA method is based on Progress Analysis of the Project and so POC is being retrieved from Project Builder and successive Progress Analysis CNE1

The requirement is after the costs are recognized based on POCX Planned Costs the Accrual/Deferral Costs are to be posted to only the below 3 cost components. 

1. Material

2. Subcontracting

3. Other Direct Costs 

and not to all of them based on a percentage split which will be derived for each one of the above separately. e.g. Percentage of Material 50%, Percentage of Subcon 30% and Percentage of Other Direct Cost 20%

In OKG8 Posting rules config there are line items to post to each of these Accrual/Deferral Accounts i.e. Material Accrual/Deferral Accounts, Subcon etc. based on the technical RA cost elements. 

 

Here there is no CO-PA so during settlement the postings to the P&L and B/S accounts should be picked up from the OKG8 settings.

My question is how do we achieve this in custom? Will it work through the RA user exit KKAG0005 (Relevant for Posting Rules) or will it have to enhanced at through user exits relevant for Settlement CJ88.

Regards,

Suman Misra

entry.title: workorder link PM_SAP 4hana
entry.content: is any possibility to link to work orders in-order to help /reminder the scheduler to schedule them together?

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi !

I'm Hoc Nguyen Quang, currently enrolled as a student at the University of Economics and Law, focusing on Management Information Systems. I hail from Lagos, Nigeria. Recently, I completed a course in ERP management which involved utilizing SAP technology. This experience has made me acquainted with SAP ERP. I'm keen on delving deeper into SAP systems as I believe it will enrich my understanding and make me more competitive in my future job endeavors. I eagerly look forward to being considered for this digital skills initiative!

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: How can we find which tables contain the field ZZEBELN.
entry.content:
Go to SE15 tcode
Choose ABAP Dictionary
Navigate to the 'Fields' folder
Select 'Table Fields'
You can then input the desired field name

entry.title: Application for Digital Skills Initiative
entry.content:
Hello David & SAP DSI Team,

I have recently come across @David_Chaviano 's blog post regarding Digital Skills Initiative and I am writing to express my interest in a free certificate attempt.

I am a young woman with more than one year of experience as an SAP ABAP developer and the world of SAP really intrigues me. I have completed many of the learning journeys in SAP Learning and could say that they are really helpful and on point (Kudos!). My focus now is heading towards ABAP Cloud world and I believe this certificate would be a great opportunity for me to evolve and prove my efforts.

Looking forward to your response.

Best regards!

Any idea?

entry.title: Very useful blog....Thanks for sharing
entry.content: Very useful blog....Thanks for sharing

entry.title: Re: GRC IAG Bridge: SF RepSync does not show role importe...
entry.content:
Hello,

GRACRLCONN table gets updated via sync job however role needs to be imported to be available in GRACROLE table. Also if you notice AC_REF_ROLE_ID field in GRACRLCONN table will be blank, it will be updated once role is imported. 

Since role is already there in GRACRLCONN, role will be available for provisioning after the import.

Hope this helps.

Regards,

Prana

entry.title: Re: Unable to Assign Firefighter ID to Firefighter Owner ID
entry.content:
Hi,

There will be a firefighter role maintained in config parameter 4010. Please assign the same to the user in backend system. Run the repository sync job to sync this access back to GRC. This should help to fix this issue.

Regards,

Prana

entry.title: SAP Successfactors with SAP BUILD APP :Quick Vacant Positions Check App
entry.content:
Positions are one of the most created/modified objects within SAP Successfactors suite  .Hence there is  a need of governing the positions and ensuring that redundant positions are not created. Its quite a tedious task  within  Successfactors(SF)  to check if vacant positions exists  and then proceed with creation of new position if vacant positions doesn't exist.

I was trying to check various options to develop a small app which  helps the  HR Admins to check availability of a vacant position before creation of new position.

Developing a full blown Fiori application as an extension in SAP BTP  was always an option but then I wanted to check if there was something simple and can be implemented  quickly without writing a lot of code.

This is where I decided to take SAP BUILD APP for a ride  and the end result was awesome. I was able to come up with a   working  demo version of the  usecase  in no time and  most importantly without writing any single piece of code.  

A final snapshot of the App (mobile version)developed in SAP BUILD APP :

 

A recording of the demo is available below

 

I would like to share my experience and also my observations on how SAP BUILD APP made Successfactors extensions development  a lot easier.

Pre-Requisites

SAP Developer Tutorials is the best place to start knowing  the basics of SAP BUILD APP and  to get it activated within the SAP BTP trial environment.

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/build-apps-trial-booster.html

https://developers.sap.com/mission.appgyver-low-code.html

 

Successfactors Connectivity and Criterias

Before launching the SAP BUILD APP,  I created a destination in the trial subaccount to connect  to one of my sandbox  SF tenants.

 

I identified the criteria based on which i wanted to find only the vacant managerial positions in Successfactors.  The criteria were the below fields

  • country (we had a custom field configured in position to capture the country )

  • cost center

In the real  scenario, we can have more criterias like Org units, company,etc., and as this was a demo --I  took only 2 fields as criteria.

SAP BUILD APP Config

1. Launch SAP BUILD APP from Instance and Subscriptions section in the trial subaccount

2.Create a project of type --SAP Build Apps -->Web &Mobile Application

 

 

3.Click on the newly created project

 

4.Navigate to Auth and Data Tab and Integrate it with SAP systems 

In our scenario we would integrate SAP BUILD APP with the destination that we created in the SAP BTP environment

First navigate to AUTH tab and enable BTP authentication

Navigate to Data tab and connect to BTP destination

5.Enable Position Data entities

6.Navigate back to UI Canvas tab and start designing your web page

Drag and drop the fields from the left panel into the app . For my app I designed as below

  • Header --

     

  • Text(Subtitle)--

     

  • A Card -- to provide a count of all vacant managerial positions

     

  • Input Fields for the criterias and a Submit button to trigger searching of the vacant managerial positions

     

  • A List object to display  the vacant position as    

     

  • Basic Table with data adapter to list all the vacant managerial positions when page is loaded.This component has to be installed from the marketplace 

     

7.Define Data Variables

I defined 2 data variables

  • Position1 -- this is linked to the BASIC TABLE component  and will contain all the managerial vacant positions
  • Position2 -- This would be linked to the managerial vacant position as per the criterias defined and would be loaded when the button 'Get Vacant Position...' is clicked

Both the variable is marked as type 'Collection of data records' as we would be querying multiple records from the position entity

8.Define Page Variables

 

The following page variables were defined

  • paramCostCenter --- This is binded to the Cost Center Input field

     

  • paramCountry-- this is binded to Country Input field

     

  • posCount --This is binded to the Card component and contains the total count of vacant positions

     

  • showVacRes -- This is binded to the visibility attribute of the container where the result of the vacant positions as per the criteria are displayed

9.On Load of Page ,load all the positions into the Basic Data Tab and  populate the count of the positions in the card.

a.Select  the Page in the UI canvas and then click on Add logic on Home Page

b.After the Page Mounted event, add 'Get Record Collection' logic and assign the Position entity as the resource.  Click on the Filter condition and provide the condition as per the screenshot below.

This logic triggers  a Query request to Position entity of SF via the BTP destination and the filter condition is also set accordingly.

c.Populate the data variable -Position1

The values from the previous step is then passed on to this logic wherein Position1 is updated   and as per the binding provided the value to Basic Table component

For the Record Collecton attribute ,  the binding type has to be set to 'Output  value of another node' and then the output of the previous node has to be selected accordingly.

d. Populate the Page variable 'posCount'

The total count of the entries within data variable Position1 is updated again the page variable 'posCount'. This is binded to the CARD component wherein the total count is displayed.

The Assigned value attribute is populated with the respective formula

10.On Click of the button--filter the position data as per the criterias mentioned and load the resulting position in the list screen.

a. Navigate to Show logic of the Button(Get Vacancy).

 

b. Add  Get Record Collection logic  and link it to Component Tap event. This logic will again trigger a query to the position entity of SF tenant via the BTP destination.

The Filter condition has to  include the page variables -paramCountry and paramCostCenter

 

c. Set the data variable Position2 to the result of the 'Get Record Collection' logic

The filter values from the Position entity are passed on the Position2 which is binded to list item wherein the results are displayed.

 

d. The other Pagevariables are related to the display of the repsective components and are binded to the visibility attribute of the component.

11. Launch and test the application

 

For preview on your mobile --you can install SAP BUILD APPS in your mobile , generate a PIN and then preview the same in your mobile

Conclusion and Observations

SAP BUILD offers a no code option to seamlessly connect to Successfactors Position entity and design the screen just by drag and drop.

SAP BUILD APP also provides a lot of options on the mobile preview  wherein it can interact with your device and perform actions like open your device camera, open contacts, interact with you device barometer,gyroscope ,etc.

One important observation was that the SAP BUILD APP doesn't provide a UPSERT action . It only provides CREATE, REPLACE, UPDATE and DELETE action when making a call to external data. When updates are done in Successfactors, UPSERT actions are predominantly used and with the existing SAP BUILD APP actions, it is very difficult to update entries in Successfactors.  For example, I started developing an app for Quick Hire of employee and in this case EmpEmployment had to be updated .This can be performed only by UPSERT action as Empemployment doesn't have Creatable enabled at the schema level.

I believe providing an UPSERT action will be part of the SAP BUILD Roadmap and once available ,it would be very easy to design Self service applications and deploy then as Successfactors extensions   with low code/no code  options.

Future development of Sucessfactors extensions with SAP BUILD looks exciting and awesome.

Looking forward to your comments   and observations.

entry.title: Kicking Off Next Generation SAP Enterprise Architect Forum: A Journey of Growth and Community
entry.content:
During my kickoff I welcomed attendees to our landmark Next Generation SAP Enterprise Architect Forum 2024. From acknowledging the remarkable turnout both in-person and online, thanking our dedicated sponsors, to sharing insights into the event's evolution and its pivotal role in the enterprise architecture community, this opening talk set the stage for a conference that was brimming with learning opportunities, innovation, and collaboration.

I discussed sessions that promised to shape our future understanding and application of SAP solutions. We are on this journey to explore, learn, and connect with peers and experts alike in the fascinating world of enterprise architecture especially in the age of AI.

 

Major Takeaways According to AI:

Community and Collaboration:

Paul emphasizes the importance of the community, thanking sponsors, supporters, volunteers, and attendees for their roles in bringing the event to life. He reflects on the growth of the Enterprise Architecture event from its inception four years ago, indicating a strong community spirit and collaborative effort. He mentions the significance of learning together and working together to help each other, suggesting future virtual activities, meetups, and collaborations to strengthen the community further.

Innovation and Growth: The talk showcases the evolution of the event and the Enterprise Architecture community over the years. Paul shares his journey of hosting a 19-city road show and how it led to the realization of the need for recurring events. This reflects a commitment to continuous improvement, innovation, and expansion of the community's reach and impact.

Educational and Knowledge Sharing: The forum is positioned as a space for sharing knowledge, networking, and shaping the future together. With a range of sessions, including deep dives into specific subjects and discussions on enterprise architecture, AI, and other cutting-edge topics, the event aims to enrich participants' understanding and skills. Paul's mention of the 'day zero' session and its positive feedback underscores the educational value of the forum.

Engagement and Interaction: The organization of the event with conversation corners, crowd-sourced trip reports, and a flag photo contest indicates a focus on engaging attendees actively. These initiatives aim to foster interactions among participants, enabling them to share experiences, learn from one another, and contribute to the collective wisdom of the community.

Future Orientation and Strategic Planning: The emphasis on enterprise architecture as a key to unlocking the value of solutions and setting up for future innovation, as highlighted in Thomas's video message, points to a future-oriented mindset. Paul's mention of the community's plans for future activities and the desire to replicate the event's success globally illustrates strategic planning for the community's growth and impact.

Accessibility and Inclusivity: Paul highlights the efforts to make the event accessible to a wider audience through live streaming and the significant online registration turnout. This demonstrates a commitment to inclusivity and expanding the community's reach beyond physical attendance.

What to Watch:

Check out this short YouTube video clip introducing our forum and also hear a very special welcome from SAP Board Member Thomas Saueressig where he talks about the importance of our Enterprise Architect SAP Community.

https://youtu.be/94KTkJGGY6E?feature=shared

Nugget of Next:

30 Days of EA Learning starts on April 1st with daily SAP Community Enterprise Architecture Group blogs and posts highlighting these that I will do on LinkedIn

CTA: For Enterprise Architect SAP Community Updates and More: Connect with and follow Paul Kurchina - http://linkedin.com/in/paulkurchina

 

Agenda - Next Generation SAP Enterprise Architecture Forum February 26-29, 2024

entry.title: Mass printing transaction VF31F disabled
entry.content:
Dear all,

At the client I am working with, there is a user who was using the VF31F transaction to do mass printing and after the SAP S/4Hana version update, the transaction was disabled by SAP.

Has anyone experienced the same situation? If so, what alternative solution did they apply so that the users could continue to print massively?

In my user's case, he executed transaction VF31F and the transaction already downloaded the invoice document in PDF format to a local folder on his computer.

entry.title: How can I create a column with "Direct Links" to classes in Plateau Report Designer?
entry.content:
Hi all, I want to create a report in Plateau Report Designer; a direct link to a class. I know the logic to build a direct link. I can identify the class id and I know the strings, which I have to add before and after the class id.

This even works in the preview in PRD, but the report fails in Success Learning. Since the concat function basically works, I assume that the strings before and after the class id create the problems. Maybe it is the special characters inside, maybe they are too long.

Do you have a workaround for that? How can I create a PRD with direct links to classes?

Thanks a lot, Uwe

entry.title: Re: How to generate a subroutine pool(MMCP****) in SAP ?
entry.content: Thank you @Sandra_Rossi for your response. Related to this if the program name is MMCP6969 for instance. Then also can i proceed with this approach of generating via MC9A

entry.title: There is a nice way to clear List of Objects in SAP BUILD APPS (AKA Appgyver)?
entry.content:
Hi dear experts.

I am doing some mix between a lot of Youtube tutorials and now i am facing some troubles with List of Object.

I want to present a list of selected Items on my app. the selection takes place in a second Page with the help of a "Add New" Button.

For this i use an App Variable "List of Objects" to store the selected items in the second page and present this list in the first page.

Everithing is working for me but i want to add logic to my app to delete the "List Of Object" when you leave the first page or when you confirm the creation of the document in the fist page.

is there a way or function that can helpme to do this?

the only way i am thiking is to do several "Set App Variable" flow functions

IF(IS_EMPTY(appVars.LISTOFOBJECTSVAR)==true,appVars.LISTOFOBJECTSVAR,WITHOUT_ITEM(appVars.LISTOFOBJECTSVAR, LAST_ITEM(appVars.LISTOFOBJECTSVAR)))

I thik there will be a smarter way to do this

entry.title: Re: Share module nativescript doesnt exist in share scope...
entry.content: Yes, I can't see the update on the client side, and I followed the tutorial, but it doesn't seem to work

entry.title: Re: I am creating an IDOC via transaction F110 for the ve...
entry.content:
I am executing a transaction F110 to create an Outbound Idoc. The message type is PAYEXT.

It is creating the outbound Idoc and status of the records is 03 . Data is passed to the port.

But what I observed that one of its segment E11EDB02 with some qualifier is not filling its many fields. There are many custom logic written inside the exit.

 

The exit name is EXIT_SAPLIEDP_002

Now, while executing the payment run via F110 transaction, it is creating the outbound idoc. But i need to debug the above exit. But it is not triggering the exit.

So what could be the best way to trigger this exit.

@Sandra_Rossi

entry.title: Re: There is a nice way to clear List of Objects in SAP BUILD APPS (AKA Appgyver)?
entry.content:
discovered the IF Flow function. I think with this logic i can continue my journey.

i am leaving this here because there are some lost data from old forums that explain this.

entry.title: Need to show error message in MIR7 If vendor belongs to cgst or igst
entry.content:
HI

We are using SAP s4 HANA. If vendor are local but booked IGST need to show error message in MIR7 screen. We tried user exit EXIT_SAPLMRMC_002 but not triggering. Other user exit include reserved for exit group.

 

Pls suggest

entry.title: Need a mock interview for sap plant maintenance module. Where can I be interviewed?
entry.content:
Need a mock interview for sap plant maintenance module. Where can I be interviewed?

Can someone send me link for my one on one mock interview? It would be great if someone replies

entry.title: Application Job does not working with Check Exit - BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I was trying to Create an Application job in the BTP ABAP Environment. When I add Check Exit for my Job Catalog Entry, it is giving an syntax error like below

Error Details:

An internal error occurred during: "Checking object...".

Execution of request "POST /sap/bc/adt/checkruns" for destination SystemName (system url )

failed: HTTP/1.1 500 Internal Server Error

 

How to Repro the issue:

  • Create new class for the Application job logic
  • Create new Applicaton Job Catalog Entry on top of above class
  • Create new Application Job Template on top of above Application Job Catalog Entry
  • Create new class for the Check Exit (Interface if_apj_jt_check_20)
  • Add the new check exit class to the Job Catalog Entry above
  • After done, In the Job Template sytax error occurs
  • If I remove the check exit class from the Catalog Entry then Syntax Error goes off

 Application Job Implementation

 

CLASS zcl_application_job_check_test DEFINITION
  PUBLIC
  FINAL
  CREATE PUBLIC .

  PUBLIC SECTION.

    INTERFACES if_apj_dt_exec_object .
    INTERFACES if_apj_rt_exec_object .
  PROTECTED SECTION.
  PRIVATE SECTION.
ENDCLASS.



CLASS zcl_application_job_check_test IMPLEMENTATION.


  METHOD if_apj_dt_exec_object~get_parameters.

    et_parameter_def = VALUE #( ( selname        = 'P_ORDR'
                                  kind           = if_apj_dt_exec_object=>parameter
                                  datatype       = 'C'
                                  length         = '10'
                                  param_text     = 'Order Id'
                                  changeable_ind = abap_true ) ).

  ENDMETHOD.


  METHOD if_apj_rt_exec_object~execute.
  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

 

 

 Check Exit Class Implementation

 

 

CLASS zcl_appl_job_check_test DEFINITION
  PUBLIC
  FINAL
  CREATE PUBLIC .

  PUBLIC SECTION.

    INTERFACES if_apj_jt_check_20 .
  PROTECTED SECTION.
  PRIVATE SECTION.
ENDCLASS.



CLASS zcl_appl_job_check_test IMPLEMENTATION.


  METHOD if_apj_jt_check_20~adjust_hidden.
  ENDMETHOD.


  METHOD if_apj_jt_check_20~adjust_read_only.
  ENDMETHOD.


  METHOD if_apj_jt_check_20~check_and_adjust.

    DATA(lv_order) = ct_value[ KEY param parameter_name = 'P_ORDR' ]-low.

    IF lv_order IS NOT INITIAL.
      INSERT VALUE #( id = 'ZMSG_HTTP' type = 'E' number = '012' ) INTO TABLE et_msg.
    ELSE.
      ev_successful = abap_true.
    ENDIF.

  ENDMETHOD.


  METHOD if_apj_jt_check_20~check_and_adjust_parameter.
  ENDMETHOD.


  METHOD if_apj_jt_check_20~check_authorizations.
  ENDMETHOD.


  METHOD if_apj_jt_check_20~check_start_condition.
  ENDMETHOD.


  METHOD if_apj_jt_check_20~get_dynamic_properties.
  ENDMETHOD.


  METHOD if_apj_jt_check_20~initialize.
  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.​

 

 Application Job Template

Application Job Catalog Entry

@michael_szardenings  - Do you aware of this issue ?

Thanks a lot.

Best Regards,

Muthu

entry.title: pyRFC license and cross license
entry.content:
Hi,

  I am using pyRFC for my development. I found it is under licensed under Apache 2.0. *https://github.com/SAP/PyRFC/blob/main/LICENSE  As mentioned there, I can use it for commercial purpose to interact with SAP data from python application and vice-a-versa.

Our customers already have SAP ECC/ S4 HANA required licenses.

However, I wonder fetching data or sending data to SAP would add cross licensing cost or not. Any experts in this group who can guide me in this issue?

Thanks,

-PD

entry.title: Re: Excel Upload using RAP: Part -2
entry.content:
For all those Who are getting the error related to 'file not found'. Make changes in your file path in controller. it should be {projectname}/ext/fragment/{name-of-fragment}.

See i have not given webapp, it is not considering/triggering webapp. 

Name your folders ( fragment, controller )  correctly.

Thanks 🙂

Considering You have changed the fragment extention from XML to lower case .xml

@meenakshi-btp

entry.title: Re: What is the significance of creating an implementatio...
entry.content:
Hi,

This allows specific functionality to be implemented at a specific projection layer but is not required for other projections. 

 Actions and Functions in Projection Behavior Definitions 

Best wishes,

Ramjee Korada

entry.title: Phase not getting reflected in Process Visisbility
entry.content:
Hi,
I am trying to add phase in Process Visibility scenario, but even though the events associated with start of phase is triggered, the phase status is shown as 'Not started' in the PV dashboard. Can anyone help me with this.
Note: The whole process is completed but still its showing phase not started.
Regards,
Keerthana

entry.title: Re: Balancing field "Segment" in line item 001 not filled
entry.content:
Hi ASWIN

Please check below Steps: I Hoppe Solved it.

IMG -->Financial Accounting(New) -->General Ledger Accounting(New) -->Business Transactions -->Document Splitting -->Define Document Splitting Characteristics for General Ledger Accounting

Thanks
M.G Rabbani

entry.title: Re: SAP NetWeaver AS ABAP Developer Edition Installation Pitfalls + Video Tutorial

entry.title: Re: How can I add custom fields (CI_PRPS fields) to CNMASS?
entry.content:
@Sandra_Rossi 

Does the option to mark a correct answer no longer exist?

entry.title: S/4 Public Cloud CBC:Event-Based Revenue Recognition Usage 302 for Loss Provision
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to set up EPPM projects revenue recognition to account for 'Onerours contracts' as per IAS 37. Once a project is planned to be in loss, i.e. planned costs > planned revenue, losses should be recognised upfront.

To try to meet this requirement,  in CBC Activity Maintain Settings for Event-Based Revenue Recognition, ID 102530, I am trying to update the assignment rule EPMCCC, sequence 5 to from 301 to use  usage  302 :Asset clearing account for netting with loss provision.

However, in CBC there does not appear to be a way to change the usage for a sequence. I can only change the accounts.  Sequence 5 seems to have the correct accounts used, 21722000, manual reserves for imminent loss and 54442000, Man Adj of Reserves for Imminent Loss. I want to change the usage from 301 to 302.  

Why is  sequence 5 set up with 301 instead of 302? Is there a way to change it?

entry.title: Re: How can I add custom fields (CI_PRPS fields) to CNMASS?
entry.content:
@raymond_giuseppi 

Finally, I got a final answer in the incident. According to the incident, I implemented different notes. One of them was an update, which is compatible with our version. Now I manage to update custom fields (CI_PRPS fields) via CNMASS TC.

One problem is left – I cannot update the custom fields via CJ20N TC (by pressing the icon 'Mass change').

What is missing in order to be able to update it via CJ20N?

Thank you

Hagit

entry.title: Demystifying SAP Service Cloud v2 REST APIs: Everything You Need to Know
entry.content:
Hi,

Do you want to unlock the full potential of SAP Service Cloud Version 2 (v2) APIs? Look no further than its robust REST APIs! These APIs provide a powerful way to integrate SAP Service Cloud v2 with SAP Build Apps, external applications, SAP Build Process Automation (automate workflows), and extend functionalities to perfectly suit your business needs.

In this blog post, we'll dive deep into the world of SAP Service Cloud v2 REST APIs. We'll cover:

  • What are REST APIs and how do they benefit SAP Service Cloud v2 users?
  • Exploring the available REST APIs for core functionalities like managing cases, tickets, and customer interactions.
  • How to get started with using REST APIs for data access and manipulation.
  • Best practices and considerations for securing and managing your API integrations.
  • Real-world examples of how businesses are leveraging REST APIs to enhance their service experience.

By the end of this post, you'll be equipped with the knowledge and resources to:

  • Understand the potential of SAP Service Cloud v2 REST APIs.
  • Identify use cases for integrating SAP Service Cloud v2 with your existing ecosystem.
  • Begin exploring and utilizing the APIs for automation and customization.

SAP Sales Cloud and Service Cloud Version 2 API Documentation

I will list out all the API endpoints for your reference to automate or to integrate the data to external applications.
 
API for Registered Product Service 
Manage entities from the registered product service
API for Registered Product Categories
Manage entities from the registered product categories

API for Functional Location Service

Manage entities from the functional location service
API for Warranty Service
Manage entities from the warranty service
API for Case Service
Manage objects from case service.
API for Appointment Service
Manage entities from the appointment service.
API for Task Service
Manage entities from the task service
 
 

Stay tuned for the next part of this blog series, where I will provide a step-by-step guide on getting started with SAP Service Cloud v2 REST APIs with SAP Build Apps!

In the meantime, feel free to share your thoughts and questions in the comments below. Happy integrating!

entry.title: Re: How can we find which tables contain the field ZZEBELN.
entry.content: Excellent. NB: SE15 = repository info system = SE84 (I didn't know SE15 used to exist)

entry.title: Re: How can I add custom fields (CI_PRPS fields) to CNMASS?
entry.content:
Not in "Discussions".

Only in "Q&A".

entry.title: Re: How can we find which tables contain the field ZZEBELN.
entry.content:
To complete the good answer by @TMRajapaksha here are SE15 / SE84 screenshots (NB: today, Community don't let me paste screenshots in comments, it's why I post an answer):

After clicking the "+" button to display more criteria:

entry.title: Re: How to generate a subroutine pool(MMCP****) in SAP ?
entry.content: Hmm it's what I said: "The generated program has name MMCP5XXX or MMCP6XXX where XXX are the characters 2 to 4 of the corresponding info structure (e.g. S500 -> XXX = 500)."

entry.title: Re: I am creating an IDOC via transaction F110 for the ve...
entry.content: Please don't repeat your question, just edit your question (add an EDIT chapter because many people have already read your question). Also, in general, don't post a question as a solution.

entry.title: Re: I am creating an IDOC via transaction F110 for the vendor , message type PAYEXT. How to debug it
entry.content: Debug may be tricky for unexperimented people. Just to be sure if one exit is called or not, you may use ABAP code at the start of the exit (e.g. MESSAGE x001(00)) to generate a short dump in ST22. You are then sure whether the exit is called or not.

entry.title: Re: How to Access Questions Related to a specific tag on SAP community
entry.content: Already asked here -> https://community.sap.com/t5/questions-about-sap-websites/how-do-i-search-for-questions-and-blog-posts-that-have-a-particular-tag/qaq-p/833609

entry.title: Re: SAP NetWeaver AS ABAP Developer Edition Installation Pitfalls + Video Tutorial
entry.content: @Ahmed101 You should ask the question here: Technology Q&A | SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Cloud ALM Landscape configuration
entry.content:
Thank you very much!  The link you sent is extremely helpful, and answered my questions.

Also, if you happen to have any information on how to set up a 3 system landscape for Cloud ALM in a Private Cloud Environment then do please share.

entry.title: Re: How to send data from Internal table to File in App. Server
entry.content:
Check out this report

 

REPORT ZK_FILE_TO_APPL_SERVER.

TABLES : KNA1.
*----------------------------------------------------------------------*
*     Data Decalaration
*----------------------------------------------------------------------*
DATA: GT_KNA1 TYPE TABLE OF KNA1,
      GS_KNA1 TYPE KNA1.
DATA: GV_FILE   TYPE RLGRAP-FILENAME.

SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF BLOCK B1 WITH FRAME TITLE TEXT-001.
SELECT-OPTIONS : S_KUNNR FOR KNA1-KUNNR OBLIGATORY.
SELECTION-SCREEN END OF BLOCK B1.


*----------------------------------------------------------------------*
*     START-OF-SELECTION
*----------------------------------------------------------------------*
PERFORM GET_DATA.

IF NOT GT_KNA1[] IS INITIAL.
  PERFORM SAVE_FILE.
ELSE.
  MESSAGE 'No data found' TYPE 'I'.
ENDIF.
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*&      Form  get_data
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*

FORM GET_DATA.
*Get data
  SELECT * FROM KNA1
         INTO TABLE GT_KNA1 WHERE KUNNR IN S_KUNNR.
ENDFORM.                    " get_data
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*&      Form  save_file
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*

FORM SAVE_FILE.
  DATA: LV_DATA TYPE STRING.

*Move complete path to filename
*  gv_file = '/tmp/cust.txt'.
  "Note if we are not passing any specific directory, by default it will
  " get stored in DIR_HOME in AL11 transaction

  CONCATENATE '/tmp/' SY-UNAME SY-DATUM SY-UZEIT '.txt' INTO GV_FILE.


* Open the file in output mode
  OPEN DATASET GV_FILE FOR OUTPUT IN TEXT MODE ENCODING DEFAULT.
  IF SY-SUBRC NE 0.
    MESSAGE 'Unable to create file' TYPE 'I'.
    EXIT.
  ENDIF.

  LOOP AT GT_KNA1 INTO GS_KNA1.
    CONCATENATE GS_KNA1-KUNNR
                GS_KNA1-ANRED
                GS_KNA1-NAME1
                GS_KNA1-LAND1
                GS_KNA1-REGIO
                GS_KNA1-CITYC
     INTO LV_DATA
     SEPARATED BY ','.
*TRANSFER moves the above fields from workarea to file  with comma
*delimited format
    TRANSFER LV_DATA TO GV_FILE.
    CLEAR: GS_KNA1.
  ENDLOOP.
* close the file
  CLOSE DATASET GV_FILE.

  CONCATENATE 'File' GV_FILE 'created' INTO DATA(GV_MSG) SEPARATED BY SPACE.

  MESSAGE GV_MSG TYPE 'I'.

ENDFORM.                    " save_file

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear Mr. @David Chaviano,

My name is Minh Tuan, and I am currently a third-year student in Vietnam. My future career aspiration is to become a SAP Consultant. After spending time researching and studying various learning journeys on the learning.sap website, I have found the content to be incredibly engaging and practical. Therefore, I am eagerly hoping to receive a voucher for the SAP certificate exam. I firmly believe that obtaining the SAP certificate wil validate my accumulated knowledge and greatly assist me in my future career. I pledge to persevere in my studies and approach the exam with utmost seriousness.

Thank you, and I wish you a wonderful day.

Best regards,
Tuan

entry.title: KSA eInvoice - DRC - Downpayment for Direct FI Invoice cases from SAP DRC for KSA
entry.content:
How to handle scenarios of downpayment in case of Direct FI Invoice as no link is between DP and Invoice. Clearing has to be performed first to ensure DP is considered from overall Invoice value.

However, eInvoice is created in Real time from SAP DRC, hence it will result in dual reporting to ZATCA.

 

Also does DRC provides useable WHT return for KSA. Need clarity on maturity of the report.

entry.title: Re: What's your favorite tip for using SAP Build Apps?
entry.content:
That's great 👏

More generally, you can always drag a flow function on the canvas and in the upper right click "Read More".

Then it will tell you what each of the outputs is for.

i want to know why defaultwarehousingshippingservice needs to check consignment process code with "xxx_ordermanagement", there is no such process code, where and when will create one?

please help me with this issue.

thanks in advance

entry.title: SAP Project System - GL Account is Invalid
entry.content:
Hello everyone,


In SAP Project System, in transaction CJ20N, when I assign a material component to an internal activity and choose my material, then I select "L" stock item for this material and I choose the following procurement type to generate a PR: PReq + Reservation for WBS Element. Afterwards, I enter the requirement quantity for this material component and then I hit enter on the keyboard to finalize the creation of this material component. I realize that the GL account assigned to this material automatically changes, from 3090300 (GBB-->VBR) to 1211000 (BSX) and an error is shown which says "GL account 1211000 is invalid". I can't save the progress for my project because when I do there is error in calculating costs since the system saw an error in this material component. What could be the cause of that?

Note: My project stock is maintained as valuated stock in the project profile configuration.

Thank you

entry.title: Re: RAP service UI is not working but OData returning response
entry.content: In the OData preview screenshot there is a TravelID=1 filter. What happens when you remove the filter? In the table settings (gear icon) ensure that at least one column is selected.

entry.title: Re: RAP service UI is not working but OData returning response
entry.content: In the OData preview screenshot there is a TravelID=1 filter. What happens when you remove the filter? In the table settings (gear icon) ensure that at least one column is selected.

entry.title: Re: RAP: Creating a child entity with 'create by association' for an existing root entity fails
entry.content: I would recommend to define the action as factory action.

entry.title: Re: Managing Security Roles across S/4HANA Public Cloud a...
entry.content:
Hello,

Its not clear if you are already using GRC? If so and you still like to leverage GRC for these S/4HANA cloud and success factor systems you can adopt IAG Bridge solution, there are some nice blogs in the community but below I find to be helpful

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/iag-bridge-scenario-grc-ac-12-0-integration-with-iag/ba-p/13564421

If still not using GRC, you may think of the IAG as a stand alone solution for your cloud systems. Below is standard documentation from SAP

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_CLOUD_IDENTITY_ACCESS_GOVERNANCE

Regards,

Prana

entry.title: Re: Page variable binded to boolean doesn't work
entry.content:
I was able to do exactly what you wanted with the page variable. I even created the third-party authentication, which I assume you used, and created it with those components/page. Not sure what is happening for you. 

When you say nothing happens, do you see the spinner and the login screen at the beginning? Can you show with Alert the value of the boolean (you'll have to use a formula and IF function)?

and this learning journey say leads to certification. SAP Certification

Revanth Kanteerava

entry.title: Material master labels print out transcation
entry.content:
Hello Everyone 

Is there any way to mass print material master labels outside the PPF and goods movement process , The issue I have is when material is received in multiple quantities only 1 label will print but each material must be labeled with the MM label , users will have to go through the PPF , GI, GR process to print more labels or create labels maually which is in both cases time consumming . 

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Crystal reports Group heading text change
entry.content:
You seem to be using an assignment operator (:=) instead of equal check (=).

For example, 

if {_PM_OSCT.U_Branch} := '53'

should be changed to :

if {_PM_OSCT.U_Branch} = '53'

entry.title: Re: What is the impact of Bank key Configuration in OY17...
entry.content:
Hi @Sanil Bhandari,

We are on ECC6,

I am looking to change this under AU (Australia)

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Minimum Pay/Wage concept in SuccessFactors Time Tracking
entry.content:
Background:

Some organizations that I have come across have a minimum wage setup. For instance, if an employee has a 8 hour work schedule Mon – Fri, they get a minimum pay equivalent to working 4 hours even if they spend 5 minutes working for that day. And further beyond 4 hours, they get the regular pay for the number of hours they work in that day.

 

How can we set this up in Time Valuation?

You might already have some of your own ways to achieve this. I found a new way of dealing with this with a new time valuation method which was introduced in 2311 i.e using Create Time Record Method. Hence, I thought of sharing the same if it helps you in any way.

Let me illustrate how this can be done in a simpler way.

 

The below is a time recording profile (Clock Times) that I am going to use to achieve this.

The first three evaluations are very self explanatory and most of this you would already know. They get recorded working time and deduct any unpaid breaks from them. Hence I would not get into details of them. Essentially the starting point would be recorded times without breaks.

 

Now the main business starts from 4th evaluation until the last one

Create a dummy 4 hour record as a sample

It can have any start time and end time as fixed value as long the duration is 4 hour

In the above example, I have it from 6:00 AM to 10:00 AM

Check Min wage/pay 4 Hours

In this time valuation we will check if recorded times excluding breaks is below the 4 hour threshold or not. It uses a compare threshold with comparison group and route input type.

If net recorded working times is less than 4 , we route the input (which is also net recorded times) to Time type group below where we store hours recorded below 4 hours for further minimum wage/pay check. If recorded hours are more than 4, then we move them to Time type group above where we pay the regular wage for the employee as per the hours worked for that day. The TTG Above CLT-PAY-REG is set as time pay type for payroll

 

Pay Min 4 Hours If Required

In this final time evaluation, we actually pay the minimum pay of 4 hours if the employee has worked less than 4 hours for that day. This too usesa compare threshold with comparison group and route input type.

As you can see , we compare the results of previous time valuation (where we stored the hours below 4 hours threshold in TTG) as a comparison group and we compare that with the threshold 0 hours.

If CLT- Store Below 4 hours is > 0, it indicates that employee has minimum 1 minute of recorded time for that day. In that case we route the input time type group Min 4 HR Record or dummy 4 HR record to Time type group above CLT – Final pay min wage where employee is paid a minimum wage or pay equivalent of 4 hours for that day.

 

Now let’s test this out

Testing

 

The employee works for just 1 hour for a day

But still gets 4 hours paid out. The minimum wage/pay concept has triggered here

Next, the employee works for 6 hours in a day. He/She gets standard pay for 6 hours as seen below

This is one of the simpler ways of achieving this requirement which may sound a bit complex to begin with.

Hope the new dimension of “CREATE TIME RECORD” time valuation is unearthed here and you use it in your time valuations

Would be happy to hear about your feedback

Thanks

Neelesh

entry.title: COPA reversal documents
entry.content:
Hi,

We have reversed COPA documents manually by using KE4S00. But while doing it we missed some documents to reverse and we reversed some documents that are already reversed.

1.how to know what are the documents that are reversed initially and 

2. how to know what are the documents that are reversed twice.

Is there any way to find out ? Can we find the reversed document in any table ?

Please suggest.  Thanks @SAPSupport

entry.title: SAP INVESTMENT MANAGEMENT
entry.content:
Hello Experts - URGENT SOLUTION NEEDED

I have to reverse IM new FY that I had opened recently. I had selected the below option under "settings'' in IM27 Tcode:
=> Copy program structure.
=> carry forward mesaure/app req.
=>carry forwards budget values:
I need reverse the FY that I have opened. 
I have tried to deleted it in IM22 but it is giving error saying budget is assigned already. Please advise.
We are on ECC,

Thanks in advance
Stalin

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear David,

Up to now I work as SAP functional consultant for more than 10 years, major in SD module. I would like to get certification in SAP S4 HANA - Sales and Distribution to improve my CV & support my work.

I hope you will consider my application for the free certification. I'm a women & single parent also.

Many thanks & regards,

entry.title: Re: CPI Post Method with Odata V2 Adapter
entry.content: <ET_EMPSet xml:base="http://Win12SAPHANA.dccil.com:8001/sap/opu/odata/sap/ZEMP_DATA_UPLD_SRV/" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2005/Atom" xmlns:m="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata" xmlns:d="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices"> <category term="ZEMP_DATA_UPLD_SRV.ET_EMP" scheme="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/scheme"/> <content type="application/xml"> <m:properties> <EmpId>${header.EmpId}</EmpId> <EmpName>${header.EmpName}</EmpName> <EmpSal>${header.EmpSal}</EmpSal> </m:properties> </content> </ET_EMPSet>

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite - How to execute POST using OData Adapter?
entry.content: was this issue resolved?

entry.title: Hana Backup deletion option for native backups solution
entry.content:
are taking backups on local disk for some time , here backups are loading to that location and not deleting any of the backups. Is there any option to delete those backup files ? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Hana Backup deletion option for native backups solution
entry.content:
To clean up older backups and remove them, you can do so via HANA studio
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_HANA_PLATFORM/6b94445c94ae495c83a19646e7c3fd56/fa0f4cccdb354ed5b45d661ed52692d3.html?version=2.0.05

or via HANA cockpit
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_HANA_PLATFORM/6b94445c94ae495c83a19646e7c3fd56/7c8ceb2924414f58b522aacebab55001.html?version=2.0.05

You can also create a retention policy to automatically delete old backups :
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_HANA_COCKPIT/afa922439b204e9caf22c78b6b69e4f2/b495da9a043a499893abc50c5cd367d9.html

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors - Custom Navigation URL Token
entry.content: So as i understand, from homepage its not inserting the user id of the logged in user?
